news.title: 10. yılında Brexit: İngiltere ekonomisi nasıl etkilendi?
news.summary: Birçok ekonomist on yıl öncesinde İngiltere'nin AB'den ayrılarak daha uzun vadeli ekonomik hasara maruz kalacağını savundu. Peki gerçekte ne oldu?

news.title: Kolombiya'dan Dünya Kupası'nda iki maçta iki galibiyet, son 32 vizesi

news.title: 2026'nın 5 aylık kaza bilançosu: 266 bin trafik kazası meydana geldi, 776 kişi hayatını kaybetti
news.summary: İçişleri Bakanlığı, 2026'nın ilk 5 ayında meydana gelen 266 bin 453 kazada 776 kişinin hayatını kaybettiğini 144 bin 101 kişinin ise yaralandığını duyurdu.

news.title: Alkollü yakalanan motosikletli: "Ehliyeti 4 gün önce aldım"
news.summary: İstanbul'da polis ekipleri il genelinde eş zamanlı olarak helikopter destekli 'Huzur İstanbul' denetimi gerçekleştirdi.

news.title: Ankara NATO Zirvesi'ne hazırlanıyor. "Operasyon Turkuaz" devrede
news.summary: Ankara'da 7-8 Temmuz'da gerçekleştirilecek zirve kapsamında alınan güvenlik tedbirleri İl Emniyet Müdürlüğünce en üst seviyede gerçekleştiriliyor.

news.title: Yapay zeka YKS'de 11 yanlış yaptı

news.title: Düzce'de deprem. İstanbul'da da hissedildi
news.summary: Düzce'de 3,1 büyüklüğünde deprem oldu. Deprem, Sakarya'nın Hendek ilçesinde ve İstanbul'da da hissedildi.

news.title: En düşük emekli maaşı ne kadar olacak?
news.summary: Milyonlarca emeklinin gözü temmuz ayında açıklanacak enflasyon verilerine çevrildi. SSK, Bağ-Kur ve memur emeklilerinin maaşlarına yapılacak artış için geri sayım sürerken, en düşük emekli aylığında yeni bir düzenleme yapılıp yapılmayacağı

news.title: Congress passes war powers measure for first time, rebuking Trump's war with Iran
news.summary: The resolution is largely symbolic, but it adds to pressure on the White House to end the conflict once and for all.

news.title: Drowning deaths soar in France as Europe buckles in peak of heatwave
news.summary: Forty people have drowned in heatwave-related deaths in France since last Thursday, Prime Minister Sébastien Lecornu says.

news.title: UN says it will evacuate sailors stranded in Strait of Hormuz, as Rubio warns against tolls
news.summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio warned Iran that no country can charge fees for ships to travel through the strait.

news.title: Clean sweep for Mamdani-backed candidates in New York's Democratic primary
news.summary: Brad Lander unseats Dan Goldman in a race that laid bare the city's divisions over the Israel-Gaza war.

news.title: Sydney woman wakes from induced coma more than a week after shark attack
news.summary: Leah Stewart, 34, had one of her arms amputated after she was bitten while swimming at Coogee Beach.

news.title: Dozens of ships head through Strait of Hormuz after US-Iran deal
news.summary: Traffic in the waterway has risen since the US and Iran signed a deal aimed at ending the war, including 42 ships on Saturday alone.

news.title: Diabetes patients in Gaza face survival battle amid war shortages
news.summary: Insulin and equipment shortages in Gaza pose fatal risks, leading to critical health complications.

news.title: Deadly heatwave grips Europe as temperatures soar across continent
news.summary: A blistering heatwave has swept across Europe triggering the highest-level red heat warnings in Britain and France.

news.title: Kenyan Health Minister orders halt of construction of US Ebola facility
news.summary: Kenya’s Health Minister has stopped the construction of a US Ebola facility in Kenya.

news.title: Ghana celebrates after holding nervous England to 0-0 draw
news.summary: Ghanaians took to the streets in celebration after the Black Stars held England to a 0-0 draw at the World Cup.

news.title: Cristiano Ronaldo becomes first player to score in six World Cups
news.summary: Cristiano Ronaldo scored twice in Portugal’s 5-0 win over Uzbekistan

news.title: Kilts and bagpipes flood Miami streets as Scotland prepare to face Brazil
news.summary: Kilts and bagpipes flood Miami streets as Scotland prepare to face Brazil.

news.title: Appeals court allows Trump administration expanded use of speedy deportations
news.summary: A federal appeals court on Tuesday allowed the Trump administration to resume carrying out speedy deportations of undocumented migrants throughout the United States, not just near the border.

news.title: Archaeologists find huge Viking textile production site in Denmark
news.summary: Archaeologists have discovered a huge Viking Age textile production site in Denmark that dates back more than 1,000 years and underlines the sophistication of Viking society.

news.title: Mamdani's political gamble pays off as his endorsed candidates sweep their primaries
news.summary: All three progressive candidates backed by New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani — including two who took on Democratic incumbents — won their primaries in safe seats almost guaranteeing their election in November.

news.title: Supreme Court rules that prison guards can't be sued for shaving Rastafarian's head
news.summary: The Supreme Court ruled that a Louisiana prisoner whose dreadlocks were forcibly shaved off by prison guards cannot sue the guards under a federal law to protect the religious rights of prisoners.

news.title: In symbolic vote, Congress directs Trump to remove forces from Iran war
news.summary: The measure to remove U.S. armed forces from hostilities with Iran does not require the president's signature, nor does it carry the force of law. But it reflects bipartisan frustration with the war.

news.title: Congress passes the largest housing affordability bill in decades
news.summary: An expansive bipartisan bill intended to bring down the cost of housing by boosting the supply of homes has passed both houses of Congress, and is headed to the president's desk for a signature.

news.title: Play puts spotlight on Kenya’s crisis of gender-based violence

news.title: UK prioritised ties with UAE over averting mass atrocities in Sudan, MPs to be told

facts.text: Honey never spoils — edible honey has been found in ancient tombs.
A day on Venus is longer than its year.
Bananas are berries; strawberries are not.
